---
# EXECUTION-SPEC Frontmatter
# Generated by lead-architect (streamlined path) — 2026-04-29

prd: PRD-071
prd_title: "Financial Telemetry — Wave 1 Phase 1.2A — API Transport Stabilization"
exec_id: EXEC-071
service: Cross-context Financial Telemetry (API layer)
mvp_phase: "1.2A"
type: cross-context API contract migration (transport stabilization)
status: draft
created: "2026-04-29"
complexity: streamlined
write_path_classification: none
gov010_check: passed

fib_s_ref: "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/phase-1-2/FIB-S-FINANCIAL-TELEMETRY-PHASE-1-2-API-ENVELOPE.json"
fib_s_version: "1.1.0"
fib_h_ref: "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/fibs/phase-1-2/FIB-H-FINANCIAL-TELEMETRY-PHASE-1-2-API-ENVELOPE.md"
handoff_ref: "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/PHASE-1.2-HANDOFF.md"
parent_exec_ref: "docs/21-exec-spec/PRD-070/EXEC-070-financial-telemetry-wave1-phase1.1-service-dto-envelope.md"
successor_prd: "PRD-074 (Phase 1.2B — Service Canonicalization)"

open_question_decisions:
  Q-1: >
    casino_id classified per representative route from code inspection.
    financial-transactions/route.ts: casino_id used internally from mwCtx.rlsContext only;
    not client-exposed in request schema — WS1 must verify request schema is clean; likely
    OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE.
    financial-transactions/[id]/route.ts: same — WS1 verifies.
    mtl/gaming-day-summary/route.ts: casino_id is an optional query param forwarded as
    `casino_id: query.casino_id || mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId` — client-RLS override;
    REMOVE the query.casino_id path; always derive from mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId.
    mtl/entries/route.ts: WS1 must confirm same pattern; if found — REMOVE.
    loyalty/balances/route.ts: casino_id is a REQUIRED query param actively forwarded as
    query.casino_id to the service — real tenant-scope violation; REMOVE from contract
    unless WS1 finds an active UI consumer passing it (then DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED, sunset 2026-07-01).
    All other representative routes: OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE where casino_id absent from code.
  Q-2: >
    CLEAN — grep of app/api/v1/ for /100 and dollarsToCents returned zero route files.
    Route layer is confirmed pass-through for math. Pre-resolved at EXEC-SPEC generation.
  Q-3: >
    All 11 route families receive representative path entries in Phase 1.2A.
    Criterion: 1 representative GET route per family; 2 where family has a financially-significant
    detail/aggregate route alongside the collection route. Full 34-route expansion is Phase 1.2B.
  Q-4: >
    loyalty/balances/route.ts: casino_id is a required param forwarded to service.
    WS1 must grep hooks/ and components/ for callers passing casino_id to this route.
    Default: REMOVE (no legitimate cross-casino use case under PT-2 RLS model).
    Override to DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED only if active consumer found; then sunset 2026-07-01.
    If REMOVE is selected, the route must not require, consume, or forward query.casino_id;
    service invocation must use mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId only, and a spoofed casino_id
    query parameter must not affect the service call.
  Q-5: >
    CLEAN — zero totalChipsOut references in live code (Phase 1.1 GATE-070.7 grep confirmed).
    No alias deprecation work required in Phase 1.2A. Pre-resolved.

decisions:
  DEC-1:
    title: "casino_id Classification Per Representative Route"
    resolution: >
      mtl routes (gaming-day-summary, entries): REMOVE query.casino_id from request contract
      and from the service call argument — always derive from mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId.
      REMOVE means the route schema does not require or consume casino_id and the service
      call never receives query.casino_id. A spoofed casino_id query parameter is tolerated
      only as an ignored unknown transport field if the existing query parser permits it;
      it must never be forwarded to service code.
      loyalty/balances: REMOVE preferred; assess consumers during WS1; DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED
      if dependency found (sunset 2026-07-01). If REMOVE is selected, update the query
      schema and route handler so player_id is the only client-owned selector and casino
      scope is derived from mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId.
      financial-transactions routes: WS1 verifies request schema is already clean (code shows
      internal RLS use only); no contract change expected.
      All other representative routes: classified OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE where casino_id
      not found in request contract.
    verification: assumption

  DEC-2:
    title: "Representative Route Selection (Phase 1.2A)"
    resolution: >
      All 11 families receive representative path entries. Two routes per family where
      collection and financially-significant detail/aggregate both exist. Full 34-route
      expansion follows in Phase 1.2B after Phase 1.2A pattern is documented and stabilized.
    verification: cited

  DEC-3:
    title: "loyalty/balances casino_id Consumer Assessment"
    resolution: >
      WS1 auditor to grep hooks/, components/, and app/ for callers passing casino_id to
      GET /api/v1/loyalty/balances. Default: REMOVE. Override to DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED
      with sunset 2026-07-01 only if active dependency confirmed. If no active dependency
      exists, remove casino_id from loyaltyBalanceQuerySchema, route docs, route handler,
      route tests, and the existing /loyalty/balances OpenAPI parameter list.
    verification: assumption

  DEC-4:
    title: "BRIDGE-001 Surfaces in Contract Tests (RULE-7 Enforcement)"
    resolution: >
      recent-sessions and live-view contract tests MUST assert envelope key presence
      (value, type, source, completeness.status present). Tests MUST NOT assert that
      value is an integer — BRIDGE-001 dollar-float is the current correct state.
      Each test file must include comment: "BRIDGE-001 active — value is dollar-float
      at Phase 1.2A; integer value assertion added in Phase 1.2B after BRIDGE-001 retirement."
      OpenAPI for these routes MUST document value as type: number (not type: integer)
      with description noting BRIDGE-001 active state.
    verification: cited

  DEC-5:
    title: "DEF-007 / WS7A Waiver Status"
    resolution: >
      WS7A waiver HOLDS for Phase 1.2A. Outbound Zod schemas for AnomalyAlertDTO and
      ShiftAlertDTO are NOT introduced in Phase 1.2A. Shift-intelligence routes carry
      bare number|null fields verbatim from service DTOs. OpenAPI documents these as
      bare number|null with note: "Phase 1.2B will promote to FinancialValue after
      AnomalyAlertDTO/ShiftAlertDTO type promotion." Phase 1.2B owns DEF-007.
    verification: cited

execution_phases:
  - name: Route Audit + casino_id Classification
    parallel: [WS1]
  - name: OpenAPI Authoring
    parallel: [WS2]
  - name: Route-Boundary Contract Tests
    parallel: [WS3]
  - name: Phase 1.2A Close Documentation
    parallel: [WS4]

gates:
  gate-ws1:
    type: route-audit
    description: >
      casino_id classified and implemented per DEC-1 for all representative routes with
      confirmed exposure. Pass-through confirmed: no /100 math, no type/source/completeness
      inference in representative route handlers. Q-1, Q-2, Q-4, Q-5 resolved and
      recorded. WS1 findings documented in checkpoint.
    validation_commands:
      - "grep -r '/100\\b' app/api/v1/financial-transactions app/api/v1/visits app/api/v1/rating-slips app/api/v1/table-sessions app/api/v1/shift-checkpoints app/api/v1/shift-intelligence app/api/v1/shift-dashboards app/api/v1/mtl app/api/v1/loyalty app/api/v1/players --include='route.ts' | wc -l  # must be 0"
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/ws1-typecheck.log 2>&1  # must exit 0"

  gate-ws2:
    type: openapi-contract
    description: >
      Shared FinancialValue component defined once in api-surface.openapi.yaml.
      Representative path entries authored for all 11 families. Carve-outs annotated.
      BRIDGE-001 surfaces document value as type: number. Deprecated casino_id fields
      include dated sunset annotation, replacement pointer, removal milestone.
      Shift-intelligence routes document bare number|null per DEC-5.

  gate-ws3:
    type: spot-contract-tests
    description: >
      Route-boundary contract tests pass under npm run test:ci. This gate is scoped to
      Phase 1.2A route-contract verification and MUST NOT be described as comprehensive
      CI coverage because test:ci excludes integration and E2E categories per ADR-044.
      Spot-check shape+transport honesty for selected representative routes only; this
      gate does not prove every route is pass-through.
      BRIDGE-001 surfaces assert key presence only (no integer assertions per DEC-4).
      casino_id classification behavior tested where DEC-1 applied REMOVE or
      DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED.
    validation_commands:
      - "npm run test:ci > /tmp/exec071-test.log 2>&1  # must exit 0 (output-safe)"
      - "! rg 'integer|toBeInteger|Number\\.isInteger' app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/__tests__/route.test.ts app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/__tests__/route.test.ts  # must find 0 matches"

  gate-ws4:
    type: dod
    description: >
      ROLLOUT-PROGRESS.md updated. PRD-071 Appendix A annotated. EXEC-071 status complete.
      Full DoD gate: type-check + lint + build all exit 0.
    validation_commands:
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/exec071-dod-typecheck.log 2>&1  # must exit 0"
      - "npm run lint -- --quiet > /tmp/exec071-dod-lint.log 2>&1  # must exit 0"
      - "npm run build > /tmp/exec071-dod-build.log 2>&1  # must exit 0"

workstreams:
  WS1:
    name: "Route Audit + casino_id Classification"
    type: route-handlers
    bounded_context: cross-context
    executor: api-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    traces_to: [CAP-1, CAP-4]
    gate: schema-validation
    estimated_complexity: medium
    description: >
      Verify only the representative routes listed in the Normative Route Inventory for
      casino_id exposure and run targeted greps for route-layer /100 math,
      type/source/completeness assignment, and totalChipsOut aliases.
      Treat pass-through as an assumed invariant with spot verification, not as an
      exhaustive proof target.
      Implement casino_id removal from MTL routes and loyalty/balances per DEC-1.
      Update affected query schemas, HTTP fetchers, and active hooks where they serialize
      removed casino_id fields. Record spot-check findings for selected routes. Produce
      WS1 findings that feed WS2 OpenAPI deprecation notes and WS3 casino_id contract tests.
    outputs:
      - "app/api/v1/mtl/gaming-day-summary/route.ts (casino_id query param removed; always mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId)"
      - "app/api/v1/mtl/entries/route.ts (same if confirmed by WS1 audit)"
      - "app/api/v1/loyalty/balances/route.ts (casino_id removed or deprecated-and-ignored per DEC-3 consumer audit)"
      - "services/mtl/dtos.ts (GET filter DTOs updated so removed client casino_id is no longer required by HTTP callers; service-internal filters may still carry derived casino_id)"
      - "services/mtl/schemas.ts (mtlGamingDaySummaryQuerySchema and mtlEntryListQuerySchema no longer require client casino_id when REMOVE applies)"
      - "services/loyalty/schemas.ts (loyaltyBalanceQuerySchema no longer requires client casino_id when REMOVE applies)"
      - "services/mtl/http.ts and hooks/mtl/* (active GET callers no longer serialize casino_id for removed MTL query parameters)"
      - "WS1 audit findings recorded in build-pipeline checkpoint (casino_id classification table)"
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Targeted grep for /100 and dollarsToCents in route handlers: CLEAN (zero hits). Confirms Q-2 pre-resolution without requiring per-route pass-through proof."
      - "Targeted grep for `.type =` or `.source =` or `.completeness` assignment inside route handler scope: CLEAN (zero hits confirms no route-layer envelope authoring)."
      - "mtl/gaming-day-summary/route.ts no longer forwards query.casino_id to the service call — always mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId."
      - "mtl/entries/route.ts same: if casino_id override pattern found, removed."
      - "MTL query schemas no longer require casino_id for GET gaming-day-summary or GET entries after REMOVE; spoofed casino_id query values are not forwarded to service calls."
      - "MTL HTTP-facing filter DTOs distinguish client-owned request filters from service-internal filters that include derived casino_id."
      - "Active MTL HTTP fetchers and hooks no longer serialize casino_id for removed GET query parameters, or WS1 records an explicit DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED exception with sunset."
      - "loyalty/balances/route.ts casino_id query param either absent from request schema (remove) or present with deprecated-and-ignored handling + OpenAPI annotation pending WS2."
      - "loyalty/balances route test proves service.getBalance receives mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId, not query.casino_id, when REMOVE is selected."
      - "financial-transactions/route.ts and [id]/route.ts: request schema verified clean (casino_id not in client request contract); classified OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE."
      - "All other representative route families: casino_id not found in request contract; classified OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE."
      - "hold_percent confirmed bare number|null at shift-intelligence route output — no FinancialValue construction in shift-checkpoints, anomaly-alerts, or alerts route handlers."
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/ws1-typecheck.log 2>&1 exits 0 after WS1 changes."

  WS2:
    name: "OpenAPI FinancialValue Component + Representative Path Entries"
    type: route-handlers
    bounded_context: cross-context
    executor: api-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1]
    traces_to: [CAP-2]
    gate: schema-validation
    estimated_complexity: medium
    description: >
      Define the shared FinancialValue component once in api-surface.openapi.yaml.
      Author representative Bucket B path entries for all 11 route families referencing
      the shared component. Annotate carve-outs explicitly. Document BRIDGE-001 surfaces
      accurately (value as type: number, not integer). Document shift-intelligence routes
      with bare number|null fields per DEC-5. Add dated deprecation annotations for
      any casino_id fields identified in WS1. Produce a reviewable OpenAPI diff.
      Representative routes are limited strictly to the Normative Route Inventory table
      below. No additional paths are eligible for Phase 1.2A authoring.
    outputs:
      - "docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml (FinancialValue component + 11-family representative path entries)"
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "components/schemas/FinancialValue defined exactly once with: value (type: number), type (enum: actual|estimated|observed|compliance), source (type: string), completeness.status (enum: complete|partial|unknown). Enum values must match types/financial.ts exactly."
      - "FinancialValue component description states: 'Currency amount in Phase 1.2A. Dollar-float values present on BRIDGE-001 surfaces (recent-sessions, live-view). Phase 1.2B canonicalizes all in-scope values to integer cents.'"
      - "At least one path entry per each of the 11 route families. Path entries use $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue' for FinancialValue-wrapped fields — no inline redefinition of envelope fields."
      - "recent-sessions path entry: FinancialValue fields use $ref to shared component; value documented as type: number (NOT type: integer) per DEC-4 and RULE-2."
      - "live-view path entry: same as above."
      - "anomaly-alerts path entry: observedValue, baselineMedian, baselineMad, thresholdValue documented as nullable: true, type: number with description: 'Bare numeric field. Phase 1.2B will promote to FinancialValue after AnomalyAlertDTO/ShiftAlertDTO type promotion.' Per DEC-5."
      - "alerts path entry: observedValue, baselineMedian, baselineMad documented same as above."
      - "hold_percent annotated in shift-intelligence and shift-checkpoint path entries as: 'Dimensionless ratio. Never FinancialValue. DEF-NEVER invariant applies across all phases.'"
      - "average_bet annotated in rating-slip path entries as: 'Operator input. Not a committed financial fact. Bare number per WAVE-1-CLASSIFICATION-RULES §6 carve-out.'"
      - "Loyalty points fields (where present) annotated as: 'Points balance, not currency-denominated. Bare number per WAVE-1-CLASSIFICATION-RULES §6 carve-out.'"
      - "mtl routes path entries: casino_id request parameter omitted entirely when REMOVE applies. If WS1 records a DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED exception, document: 'Deprecated as of 2026-04-29. Ignored by server. Sunset: 2026-07-01. Replacement: RLS context derives casino scope from authenticated staff session.'"
      - "loyalty/balances path entry: casino_id treatment matches WS1 outcome — either absent (removed) or present with deprecated annotation including sunset 2026-07-01 and replacement: 'Derived from authenticated session via RLS context.'"
      - "Existing /loyalty/balances OpenAPI entry is updated in place; no duplicate path entry is introduced."
      - "financial-transactions path entries do not include casino_id in request schema (WS1 verified already clean)."
      - "OpenAPI changes MUST NOT modify any paths outside the representative routes listed in the Normative Route Inventory, even if inconsistencies are observed."
      - "OpenAPI change is a coherent single diff — no scattered undocumented edits. All changes traceable to a Phase 1.2A representative route or carve-out annotation."

  WS3:
    name: "Route-Boundary Contract Tests"
    type: route-handlers
    bounded_context: cross-context
    executor: api-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1, WS2]
    traces_to: [CAP-3]
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium
    description: >
      Write or expand route-boundary contract tests only where Phase 1.2A changes behavior
      or where an existing Phase 1.1 envelope surface needs a representative spot-check.
      These tests do not attempt to prove every route is pass-through. They assert:
      FinancialValue envelope keys are preserved where the service already emits them;
      routes do not flatten or re-author envelope fields in the spot-checked paths;
      bare-number carve-outs are correctly bare; casino_id classification behavior matches
      DEC-1. BRIDGE-001 test discipline: assert key presence only, never integer value,
      per DEC-4 and RULE-7. Shift-intelligence: assert bare number|null state per DEC-5.
    outputs:
      - "app/api/v1/mtl/gaming-day-summary/__tests__/route.test.ts (required: casino_id REMOVE behavior)"
      - "app/api/v1/mtl/entries/__tests__/route.test.ts (required: casino_id REMOVE behavior)"
      - "app/api/v1/loyalty/balances/__tests__/route.test.ts (required if REMOVE or DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED selected)"
      - "app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/__tests__/route.test.ts (representative BRIDGE-001 spot-check; expand existing test)"
      - "app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/__tests__/route.test.ts (representative BRIDGE-001 spot-check; expand existing test)"
      - "services/shift-intelligence/__tests__/anomaly-alerts-route-boundary.test.ts (representative DEF-007 bare-number spot-check)"
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Spot-check test files assert at minimum: FinancialValue fields (value, type, source, completeness.status) are present in response body where the service already emits FinancialValue. Test must destructure and assert each key individually — not just assert the object is truthy."
      - "No test or implementation wraps an unwrapped service DTO at the route layer. If a route calls a service that has not been wrapped yet, record it as a Phase 1.1 defect or Phase 1.2B successor input; do not fix it in the route."
      - "BRIDGE-001 surfaces (live-view, recent-sessions): no assertion checks `typeof value === 'number' && Number.isInteger(value)` or `.toBeGreaterThan(100)` or any integer-specific assertion on FinancialValue.value. Each test file must include BRIDGE-001 comment per DEC-4."
      - "Shift-intelligence tests (anomaly-alerts, alerts): assert observedValue, baselineMedian, baselineMad, thresholdValue are null or a plain number (not an object with value/type/source keys). Assert hold_percent is null or a plain number in the same response."
      - "casino_id REMOVE treatment: test makes request with a spoofed casino_id query param present and asserts the service call receives mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId only. The test must not accept forwarding query.casino_id under any status outcome."
      - "casino_id DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED treatment: test makes two identical requests differing only by casino_id query param presence; asserts responses are identical (same data, same status)."
      - "average_bet in rating-slip responses: asserted as plain number (not a FinancialValue object)."
      - "No test uses `as any` or TypeScript bypass to coerce route handler output types."
      - "npm run test:ci > /tmp/exec071-test.log 2>&1 exits 0 (output-safe per CLAUDE.md §Agent Shell Safety)."
      - "Ripgrep for integer-value assertions on BRIDGE-001 test files returns no matches (see gate-ws3 validation commands)."

  WS4:
    name: "Phase 1.2A Close Documentation"
    type: cross-cutting
    bounded_context: cross-context
    executor: lead-architect
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3]
    traces_to: [infrastructure]
    gate: build
    estimated_complexity: low
    description: >
      Update rollout governance documents to reflect Phase 1.2A completion. Annotate PRD-071
      Appendix A with Phase 1.2A vs 1.2B column. Record Q-1 through Q-5 decision records.
      Update EXEC-071 status to complete. Run and confirm full DoD gate (type-check, lint, build).
    outputs:
      - "docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-PROGRESS.md (Phase 1.2A complete entry)"
      - "docs/10-prd/PRD-071-financial-telemetry-wave1-phase1.2-api-envelope-at-wire-v0.md (Appendix A annotated with Phase 1.2A / 1.2B column)"
      - "docs/21-exec-spec/PRD-071/EXEC-071-financial-telemetry-wave1-phase1.2a-api-transport-stabilization.md (status: complete)"
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "ROLLOUT-PROGRESS.md records Phase 1.2A completed with date and commit reference; Phase 1.2B pending scope linked to PRD-074."
      - "PRD-071 Appendix A table has new column 'Phase 1.2A / 1.2B' marking each route as: representative-1.2A (covered in this phase) or deferred-1.2B."
      - "EXEC-071 status field updated from draft to complete."
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/exec071-dod-typecheck.log 2>&1 exits 0."
      - "npm run lint -- --quiet > /tmp/exec071-dod-lint.log 2>&1 exits 0."
      - "npm run build > /tmp/exec071-dod-build.log 2>&1 exits 0."
---

# EXEC-071 — Financial Telemetry Wave 1 Phase 1.2A — API Transport Stabilization

## Overview

Phase 1.2A confirms transport honesty at the API boundary without rebuilding transport. It removes unauthorized tenant-scope overrides, confirms routes do not mutate financial data via targeted greps and spot checks, defines the shared OpenAPI `FinancialValue` component, and authors representative path entries for in-scope route families. It does **not** attempt to prove every route is pass-through. It does **not** change units, promote DTO types, wrap unwrapped service DTOs, or perform UI migrations — those are Phase 1.1 defect remediation or Phase 1.2B (PRD-074) scope.

**One-line invariant:** Phase 1.2A does not improve the system. It only makes it stop lying.

**Phase 1.1 exit state (2026-04-25):** Service DTOs emit `FinancialValue` envelopes. Visit surfaces carry dollar-float values (BRIDGE-001 active). Shift-intelligence fields remain bare `number|null` (deferred). All 34 in-scope routes are absent from OpenAPI.

**Phase 1.2A exit state (target):** Client-owned `casino_id` leakage is removed or explicitly deprecated-and-ignored where dependency forces a temporary bridge. Route-layer financial mutation remains absent by targeted grep and representative spot-check. Shared `FinancialValue` OpenAPI component defined once. Representative path entries authored. BRIDGE-001 remains active but accurately documented. Phase 1.2B can begin canonicalization on this cleaner base.

---

## Phase 1.2A Hard Boundary

The one-line invariant from FIB-S v1.1.0:
> If a change removes tenant-scope leakage or documents existing service semantics faithfully at the wire, it is in scope. If it changes what the semantics are (unit, type, format) or wraps/unwraps DTO fields, it is Phase 1.1 defect remediation or Phase 1.2B.

**Phase 1.2A MUST NOT:**
- Assign `type`, `source`, or `completeness` inside any route handler (RULE-1)
- Wrap or unwrap service DTO fields inside any route handler
- Refactor routes for style, structure, or abstraction
- Attempt exhaustive proof that every route is pass-through
- Remove `/100` from `services/visit/crud.ts` or `services/rating-slip/mappers.ts` — Phase 1.2B
- Enforce `financialValueSchema.int()` at the DTO outbound boundary — Phase 1.2B
- Wrap `AnomalyAlertDTO` or `ShiftAlertDTO` numeric fields in `FinancialValue` — Phase 1.2B
- Wrap `hold_percent` in `FinancialValue` under any circumstances — DEF-NEVER
- Build Phase 1.3 UI components (`FinancialValue.tsx`, `AttributionRatio.tsx`, `CompletenessBadge.tsx`)
- Implement Phase 1.4 ESLint rules
- Attempt big-bang authoring of all 34 Bucket B routes
- Leave any in-scope deprecated field without a dated sunset annotation and replacement pointer in OpenAPI

---

## Pre-Implementation Findings (Resolved at EXEC-SPEC Generation)

| Item | Finding | Status |
|------|---------|--------|
| Q-2: /100 in routes | grep app/api/v1/ for /100 and dollarsToCents — zero route files | ✅ CLEAN |
| Q-5: totalChipsOut | Phase 1.1 GATE-070.7 grep — zero live references | ✅ CLEAN |
| Q-3: representative selection | All 11 families covered; 1–2 routes per family | ✅ Decided (DEC-2) |
| financial-transactions casino_id | Code shows internal RLS use only; request schema appears clean | 🔍 WS1 verifies |
| loyalty/balances casino_id | Required query param forwarded as `query.casino_id` — real violation | ⚠️ WS1 resolves per DEC-3 |
| mtl routes casino_id | Optional override: `query.casino_id \|\| mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId` | ⚠️ WS1 removes |
| DEF-007 / WS7A waiver | Waiver holds for Phase 1.2A; shift-intelligence DTO promotion is Phase 1.2B | ✅ DEC-5 |
| BRIDGE-001 state | Still active; dollar-float on visit surfaces; document accurately in OpenAPI | ✅ DEC-4 |

---

## Decision Records

### DEC-1 — casino_id Classification Per Representative Route

| Route | Code finding | Phase 1.2A classification | Implementation |
|-------|-------------|---------------------------|----------------|
| `financial-transactions/route.ts` | `mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId` only in code | OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE (pending WS1 schema verification) | WS1 verifies request schema clean; no change if confirmed |
| `financial-transactions/[id]/route.ts` | Same pattern | OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE (pending WS1) | WS1 verifies |
| `mtl/gaming-day-summary/route.ts` | `query.casino_id \|\| mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId` — client override | REMOVE | WS1 removes query path; always `mwCtx.rlsContext!.casinoId` |
| `mtl/entries/route.ts` | WS1 confirms pattern | REMOVE (if same override found) | WS1 removes |
| `loyalty/balances/route.ts` | Required `query.casino_id` forwarded to service | REMOVE (preferred) | WS1 removes unless consumer dependency found (then DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED, sunset 2026-07-01) |
| All other representative routes | No casino_id in request contract | OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE | No change; WS1 confirms |

**Rationale:** PT-2 uses single-casino RLS scoping (ADR-020, ADR-024). No legitimate cross-casino query exists for an authenticated staff member. A client-provided `casino_id` that overrides or supplements RLS context implies caller-owned tenant scope, which is precisely the transport truthfulness violation PRD-071 §1 targets. Default action is REMOVE per PRD-071 §1 default migration preference.

### DEC-2 — Representative Route Selection (Phase 1.2A)

All 11 route families receive at least one representative path entry. Where a family has both a collection and a financially-significant detail/aggregate route, both are included. Full 34-route expansion is Phase 1.2B after the representative contract pattern is documented and stabilized.

Selection criterion: representative GET read route per family. For families with a POST command route that has distinct response envelope shape, include both read and command only where needed to document §4.2 request-vs-response schema separation.

### DEC-3 — loyalty/balances Consumer Assessment (WS1)

WS1 executor must grep `hooks/`, `components/`, and all `app/` call sites for requests to `/api/v1/loyalty/balances` with a `casino_id` query param. Default treatment: REMOVE. If active dependency found → DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED with sunset 2026-07-01. Document finding in checkpoint.

### DEC-4 — BRIDGE-001 Surfaces in Contract Tests (RULE-7)

`recent-sessions` and `live-view` contract tests must assert envelope key presence only. They MUST NOT assert:
- `value` is an integer
- `value` is greater than 100 (implying cents)
- `Number.isInteger(value)`

Each test file must include this comment above the relevant assertions:
```ts
// BRIDGE-001 active: value is dollar-float at Phase 1.2A.
// Integer value assertion added in Phase 1.2B after BRIDGE-001 retirement.
// See: docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json
```

OpenAPI for these routes must document `value` as `type: number` (NOT `type: integer`).

### DEC-5 — DEF-007 / WS7A Waiver Status

WS7A waiver holds for Phase 1.2A. Shift-intelligence route handlers carry `AnomalyAlertDTO` and `ShiftAlertDTO` fields verbatim as bare `number | null`. Phase 1.2A:
- Does NOT wrap these fields in `FinancialValue` at the route layer
- Does NOT introduce outbound Zod schemas for these DTOs
- DOES document the bare `number | null` state accurately in OpenAPI with a Phase 1.2B upgrade note

Phase 1.2B (PRD-074) owns DEF-007 resolution.

---

| `app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/route.ts` | Visit live-view | `services/rating-slip/` | Carry Phase 1.1 live-view envelope verbatim; document BRIDGE-001 dollar-float in OpenAPI | None | Bucket B (new path; expand existing test) | `[visitId]/live-view/__tests__/route.test.ts` (EXPAND Phase 1.1) |
| `app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/route.ts` | Player recent sessions | `services/visit/` | Carry Phase 1.1 recent-session envelope verbatim; document BRIDGE-001 dollar-float in OpenAPI | None | Bucket B (new path; expand existing test) | `[playerId]/recent-sessions/__tests__/route.test.ts` (EXPAND Phase 1.1) |
| `app/api/v1/rating-slips/route.ts` | Rating-slip collection | `services/rating-slip/` | Spot-check no route-layer financial mutation; annotate average_bet as bare operator input | None | Bucket B (new) | optional spot-check |
| `app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/route.ts` | Rating-slip modal data | `services/rating-slip-modal/` | Confirm totalCashOut FinancialValue envelope shape; confirm zero totalChipsOut fields | None | Bucket B (new path; expand existing test) | `[id]/modal-data/__tests__/route.test.ts` (EXPAND Phase 1.1) |
| `app/api/v1/table-sessions/route.ts` | Table sessions | `services/table-context/` | Spot-check no route-layer financial mutation; document existing raw-total transport truthfully | None expected | Bucket B (new) | optional spot-check |
| `app/api/v1/table-sessions/[id]/rundown/route.ts` | Table sessions | `services/table-context/` | Verify declared derived values envelope; document any raw-total deprecations | None expected | Bucket B (new) | `[id]/rundown/__tests__/route.test.ts` (new) |

| `app/api/v1/mtl/entries/route.ts` | MTL entries | `services/mtl/` | Verify compliance envelope; REMOVE casino_id query override if found | REMOVE (WS1 confirms) | Bucket B (new) | `mtl/entries/__tests__/route.test.ts` (new) |

## Intake Traceability Audit (FIB-S v1.1.0)

| Dimension | Result |
|---|---|
| Workstream capability coverage | 4/4 capabilities covered: CAP-1 → WS1, CAP-2 → WS2, CAP-3 → WS3, CAP-4 → WS1 |
| Anti-invention — descriptions | No workstream introduces surfaces, APIs, or side-paths absent from FIB-S v1.1.0 surfaces. UI surfaces (start-from-previous.tsx etc.) absent from amended FIB-S and absent from all workstreams. ✅ CLEAN |
| Anti-invention — output paths | All output paths in workstreams are existing route files, existing test files (expansions), or api-surface.openapi.yaml. No new API paths introduced. ✅ CLEAN |
| Open question disposition | Q-1 through Q-5 all resolved or assigned to WS1 for resolution. Q-2 and Q-5 pre-resolved CLEAN. Q-3 decided in DEC-2. Q-1/Q-4 resolved in DEC-1/DEC-3 with WS1 confirming implementation. ✅ CLEAN |
| Hard rule visibility | RULE-1 → WS1 + WS3 acceptance criteria. RULE-2 → WS2 + DEC-4. RULE-3 → WS1 + WS3 acceptance criteria. RULE-4 → WS1 + DEC-1. RULE-5 → WS2. RULE-6 → EXEC-SPEC scope boundary. RULE-7 → WS3 + DEC-4. All 7 hard rules visible in workstream acceptance criteria. ✅ CLEAN |
| Decision-to-test injection | DEC-1 (casino_id) → WS3 casino_id classification behavior tests. DEC-4 (BRIDGE-001) → WS3 key-presence-only assertions. DEC-5 (DEF-007) → WS3 bare number\|null assertions for shift-intelligence. ✅ INJECTED |

**Deferred capabilities note:** FIB-S v1.0.0 (original) contained 8 capabilities. FIB-S v1.1.0 (amended 2026-04-29 per PRD-071-AUDIT.md) reduced to 4 capabilities covering Phase 1.2A scope only. CAP-1 (cents canonicalization), CAP-2 (shift-intelligence wrapping), CAP-6 (UI migration), and CAP-7 (component tests) of the original FIB-S are governed by Phase 1.2B (PRD-074). The amended FIB-S is the governing authority for EXEC-071.

---

## Definition of Done

Phase 1.2A is complete when all gates pass and all items below are checked:

**Transport Truthfulness**
- [ ] Targeted route greps confirm no /100 math and no type/source/completeness inference inside route handlers
- [ ] No route handler constructs or re-authors `FinancialValue` — route layer is transport only (RULE-1)
- [ ] Any unwrapped service DTO discovered is recorded as Phase 1.1 defect or Phase 1.2B input; no route-layer wrapping added
- [ ] BRIDGE-001 surfaces (recent-sessions, live-view) carry dollar-float `FinancialValue` verbatim without modification (RULE-2)
- [ ] Shift-intelligence routes carry bare `number|null` fields verbatim — no FinancialValue construction at route layer (DEC-5)

**Tenant Scope Honesty**
- [ ] mtl/gaming-day-summary and mtl/entries no longer forward `query.casino_id` to service — RLS context only
- [ ] loyalty/balances `casino_id` removed from contract (or deprecated-and-ignored with 2026-07-01 sunset if consumer found)
- [ ] All other representative routes: casino_id classified and documented (OUT-OF-SCOPE-WITH-RATIONALE where absent)

**OpenAPI**
- [ ] Single shared `FinancialValue` component defined in `api-surface.openapi.yaml` — no inline redefinitions
- [ ] Representative path entries for all 11 route families authored
- [ ] BRIDGE-001 surfaces document `value` as `type: number` (not `type: integer`)
- [ ] Shift-intelligence routes document bare `number|null` fields with Phase 1.2B upgrade note
- [ ] Carve-outs annotated: `hold_percent`, `average_bet`, loyalty points
- [ ] Any deprecated fields include dated sunset annotation, replacement pointer, and removal milestone (RULE-5, RULE-7)

**Contract Tests**
  - [ ] Required casino_id REMOVE / DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED route tests pass
  - [ ] Representative BRIDGE-001 and DEF-007 spot-check tests pass
- [ ] BRIDGE-001 surface tests assert key presence only; zero integer-value assertions; BRIDGE-001 comment present (DEC-4, RULE-7)
- [ ] Shift-intelligence tests assert bare `number|null` state (DEC-5)
- [ ] casino_id classification behavior tested where DEC-1 applied REMOVE or DEPRECATED-AND-IGNORED
- [ ] `npm run test:ci > /tmp/exec071-test.log 2>&1` exits 0

**Governance**
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run lint -- --quiet` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0
- [ ] ROLLOUT-PROGRESS.md updated: Phase 1.2A complete, Phase 1.2B pending scope linked to PRD-074
- [ ] PRD-071 Appendix A annotated with Phase 1.2A / 1.2B column
- [ ] EXEC-071 status updated to complete

---

| `AnomalyAlertDTO` / `ShiftAlertDTO` numeric field wrapping via `resolveShiftMetricAuthority` | Service-layer mapper rewrite; DEF-007 waiver holds | PRD-074 WS? |
| `formatDollars` → `formatCents` UI render migration on BRIDGE-001 surfaces | Requires integer cents at wire first | PRD-074 WS? |
| Full 34-route Bucket B OpenAPI authoring | Pattern-first discipline per guardrail | PRD-074 WS? |
| Runtime structured log observability for deprecated-field usage | Phase 1.2A uses OpenAPI annotation only (RULE-5) | PRD-074 WS? |
| Component tests (`rating-slip-modal.test.tsx`, `start-from-previous.test.tsx`, `start-from-previous-modal.test.tsx`) | Deferred per Phase 1.1 WS9 + guardrail audit | PRD-074 WS? |
| Full 4-case route test matrices for `recent-sessions` and `live-view` | Post-canonicalization test expansion | PRD-074 WS? |
| `shift-intelligence/alerts/route.ts` additional tests | Covered by anomaly-alerts expansion as representative; alerts expansion is Phase 1.2B | PRD-074 WS? |
